Properties.Description: AI voice assistant for dental clinic after-hours calls
Properties.Name: TodaysDentalInsightsConnectLexAiN1-DentalAIv3

Properties.Description: AWS CDK resource provider framework - onEvent (TodaysDentalInsightsConnectLexAiN1/KeyboardPromptProvider)
Keyboard typing sound for AI thinking indicator
Finalizes AI call analytics on disconnect
Properties.Name: TodaysDentalInsightsConnectLexAiN1-DisconnectFlow

Properties.Description: AWS CDK resource provider framework - onEvent (TodaysDentalInsightsConnectLexAiN1/CreateContactFlowProvider)
AI voice assistant using Lex and Bedrock with keyboard sound thinking indicator
AWS CDK resource provider framework - onEvent (TodaysDentalInsightsConnectLexAiN1/CreateAsyncContactFlowProvider)
AI voice assistant with async pattern - continuous keyboard sounds during processing
AWS CDK resource provider framework - onEvent (TodaysDentalInsightsConnectLexAiN1/PhoneAssociationProvider)
AWS CDK resource provider framework - onEvent (TodaysDentalInsightsConnectLexAiN1/CreateOutboundContactFlowProvider)

InboundFlowArn.Description: Active Inbound AI Contact Flow ARN (sync or async based on useAsyncPattern)

OutboundFlowId.Description: Outbound AI Contact Flow ID (for StartOutboundVoiceContact)

AsyncBedrockLambdaArn.Description: Async Bedrock Lambda ARN (60s timeout for complex tool calls)

AsyncResultsTableName.Description: DynamoDB table for async results polling

AsyncPatternEnabled.Description: Async pattern is enabled with continuous keyboard sounds

AssociatedPhoneNumber.Description: Phone number associated with the AI contact flow

KeyboardSoundPromptId.Description: Connect Prompt ID for keyboard typing sound (thinking indicator)

ConnectPromptsBucketName.Description: S3 bucket containing Connect prompts (audio files)

DeploymentInfo.Value:
DEPLOYMENT COMPLETE:
- Inbound AI Flow: TodaysDentalInsightsConnectLexAiN1-AsyncInboundAiFlow
- Disconnect Flow: TodaysDentalInsightsConnectLexAiN1-DisconnectFlow  
- Phone Number: +14439272295 (auto-associated)
- Lex Bot: TodaysDentalInsightsConnectLexAiN1-DentalAIv3 (alias: prod)
- Keyboard Sound: Plays during AI thinking
- Async Pattern: ENABLED (60s timeout, continuous keyboard sounds)
- Max Poll Loops: 25 (~50s max wait)

Then call +14439272295 to test the AI assistant!
